title: Sales Executive
description:
Key Responsibilities

1. Post–DLP Estate Handover (Project → Service)

- Prepare budgetary maintenance quotations for clients.

- Follow up with MCST/Managing Agents as the DLP approaches completion.

- Coordinate formal estate handover from Project to Service Department.

- Ensure completeness of handover reports, documents, and commissioning details.

- Conduct system walkthroughs and obtain official sign-offs.

2. Lead Generation & Business Development

- Identify, research, and develop new business opportunities.

- Build relationships with prospects and generate qualified leads.

3. Consultative Selling & Solution Design

- Conduct needs assessments.

- Provide tailored recommendations.

- Work with technical teams to design customized solutions.

- Develop proposals including cost estimates, scope, timelines.

4. Product Demonstrations & Presentations

- Conduct demos of electronic security and digital modules.

- Present features, benefits, and advantages.

5. Promote Additional Hardware & Digital Solutions

- Introduce and promote LPR, QR/Bluetooth/Mobile access, VMS, FR devices, intercom, CCTV integrations.

- Promote digital modules including facility booking, announcements, marketplace, automation.

6. Relationship & Account Management

- Maintain strong relationships with MCST councils and Managing Agents.

- Provide ongoing support and manage post-sales inquiries.

7. Internal Coordination

- Work with Project, Service, Technical, Engineering, Product teams.

- Maintain estate records.

- Prepare proposals and documentation.

8. Market Research & Competitor Analysis

- Stay informed about industry trends and competitor activities.

- Identify new market segments.

Requirements

- Diploma/Bachelor’s in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or related field.

- Entry-level candidates and fresh graduates are encouraged to apply.

- Experience in technical sales, estate solutions, or electronic security systems.

- Strong knowledge of access control, CCTV, intrusion systems, fire alarm, and estate platforms.

- Excellent communication and negotiation skills.

postedCompany.description:
FERMAX - A World-Leading Brand with Over 75 Years of Innovation

Founded in 1949 in Valencia, Spain, FERMAX has spent more than 75 years at the forefront of technological innovation in door entry systems and access control. Today, our solutions are trusted in millions of homes and buildings worldwide, recognized for their reliability, quality, and design excellence.

As a pioneer in audio and video door entry technologies, FERMAX continues to lead the market in building intercommunication and access solutions. Our systems are designed to transcend cultural and architectural boundaries, delivering seamless, secure, and intuitive communication between indoor and outdoor spaces.

At building entrances, FERMAX systems enable clear, reliable communication and secure access management. Inside residences, our monitors and telephones play a central role in enhancing everyday convenience, safety, and smart living integration.

With a global presence and a strong commitment to service, FERMAX is not just a product — it's a promise of performance, design, and continuous innovation.

Join the FERMAX family and experience the future of smart building solutions, built on a legacy of excellence.
postedCompany.name: FERMAX ASIA PACIFIC PTE. LTD.
